title: Korak 24

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Statistics Calculator

Enter a list of comma-separated numbers.

The mean of a list of numbers is the average, calculated by taking the sum of all numbers and dividing that by the count of numbers.

Mean:

The median of a list of numbers is the number that appears in the middle of the list, when sorted from least to greatest.

Median:

The mode of a list of numbers is the number that appears most often in the list.

Mode:

The range of a list of numbers is the difference between the largest and smallest numbers in the list.

Range:

The variance of a list of numbers measures how far the values are from the mean, on average.

Variance:

The standard deviation of a list of numbers is the square root of the variance.

Standard Deviation:

challengeFiles.name: styles
script

tests.text: Treba da postavite rezultat dobijanja medijane od testArr2 u parametar evenListMedian. Pogledajte primer za više pomoći.
Trebalo bi da napišete parametar evenListMedian u konzoli.

description:
Da biste pronašli medijanu popisa koji ima paran broj elemenata, morate pronaći dve srednje vrednosti i izračunati njihov prosek.

Ovo je kako dobijate dve srednje brojeve iz čak i liste sa mnogo stavki:

// first middle number
arr[arr.length / 2];
// second middle number
arr[(arr.length / 2) - 1];

Da biste dobili medijanu, možete koristiti funkciju getMean`` koja sabira srednje brojeve i deli zbir sa ``2.

const numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4];
const firstMiddleNumber = numbers[numbers.length / 2];
const secondMiddleNumber = numbers[(numbers.length / 2) - 1];
// result is 2.5
getMean([firstMiddleNumber, secondMiddleNumber]);

Definiši parametar za evenListMedian i postavi mu vrednost kao rezultat izračunavanja medijane od testArr2.

Zatim, unesite parametar za evenListMedian u konzolu.
